markdown.markdown:
Greetings, I am a first-year Statistics PhD student at Carnegie Mellon University. Previously, I spent a year in Paris completing the M1 Applied Mathematics and Statistics program at the Polytechnic Institute of Paris. During my time in Paris, I also completed an AI engineering internship at Ennov. Prior to that, I spent two formative years in New York City as a Senior Research Analyst in the Financial Intermediation group at the Federal Reserve Bank of New York after graduating with bachelor's degrees in Economics and Statistics from the University of California, Davis. *Drivers of Dollar Share in Foreign Exchange Reserves*. Linda Goldberg and Oliver Hannaoui. 2025. [[WP]](https://www.nber.org/system/files/working_papers/w34888/w34888.pdf) [[Blog]](https://libertystreeteconomics.newyorkfed.org/2024/05/taking-stock-dollar-assets-gold-and-official-foreign-exchange-reserves/).
★ Media: \ \ [ ](https://www.ft.com/content/be345914-7b4b-4264-bcbd-6e5e33b798c7) \ • \ [](https://deloitte.wsj.com/cfo/fresh-support-for-the-dollar-as-global-currency-79db250b) \ • \ [](https://www.reuters.com/markets/currencies/demise-dollars-fx-reserve-omnipotence-greatly-exaggerated-mcgeever-2024-06-06/). #### Academic Blogs *What Do Climate Risk Indices Measure?* \ Oliver Hannaoui and Hyeyoon Jung. 2024. [[Blog]](https://ideas.repec.org/p/fip/fednls/98933.html).
*Flood Risk and Firm Location Decisions in the Fed's Second District*. Oliver Hannaoui, Hyeyoon Jung, João AC Santos, and Lee Seltzer. 2023. [[Blog]](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=4632858).
